# IDsvault

> India's broker-assisted marketplace for buying and selling premium Instagram handles, X (Twitter) usernames, and Telegram channels. Based in Hyderabad, Telangana.

## What We Do

IDsvault facilitates the secure transfer of valuable social media usernames between buyers and sellers. Every transaction is supervised by a human broker from our Hyderabad desk. The buyer's payment is held in escrow until they confirm full account access — neither party can be scammed.

We are an independent brokerage. We are not affiliated with Meta (Instagram), X Corp, or Telegram.

## Platforms

- Instagram handles (e.g. @brand, @company, @shortname)
- X (Twitter) usernames
- Telegram channels and usernames

## How a Transaction Works

1. Buyer submits an offer on the IDsvault website or via WhatsApp (+91 93929 74031)
2. Seller ownership is verified by the Hyderabad desk before any listing is published
3. Buyer pays IDsvault via UPI or bank transfer — funds held in escrow
4. A broker supervises a live call where the seller transfers the account
5. Buyer confirms full control: updates recovery email, phone number, and 2FA
6. IDsvault releases the held payment to the seller, minus the brokerage fee

## Pricing

All prices are in Indian Rupees (₹). Typical values range from ₹1 lakh to ₹20+ lakhs depending on handle length, platform, and commercial value. Price on Request (POR) listings require direct contact.

## Buyer Protections

- Seller verified before listing goes live
- Payment in escrow — full refund if transfer fails
- Human broker on every live transfer call
- Refund processed within 3 business days if deal falls through

## Seller Protections

- Protected from payment chargebacks
- Protected from account recovery attempts after transfer
- Broker ensures payment is released only after buyer confirms control

## Contact

- WhatsApp: +91 93929 74031 (preferred contact method)
- Email: support@idsvault.com
- Hours: Monday to Saturday, 9:30 AM – 8:30 PM IST
- Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

## Website

- Homepage: https://idsvault.com
- Browse handles: https://idsvault.com/browse
- Sell a handle: https://idsvault.com/sell
- Custom sourcing: https://idsvault.com/source
- Contact: https://idsvault.com/contact
- FAQ: https://idsvault.com/faq

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: How are sellers verified?
A: Sellers must prove current account ownership through direct checks before any listing is accepted.

Q: What happens if the transfer fails?
A: The buyer's payment is refunded in full within 3 business days.

Q: What payment methods do you accept?
A: UPI and bank transfer (NEFT/IMPS). Payment details shared after deal confirmation.

Q: Are you affiliated with Instagram, X, or Telegram?
A: No. IDsvault is fully independent. Not affiliated with Meta, X Corp, or Telegram.

Q: What is your brokerage fee?
A: Fee disclosed during deal initiation. Contact us on WhatsApp for current rates.
